moments.author: Donald J. Trump
moments.quote: Despite the heat, which isn’t as bad as predicted, the crowds in D.C. are INCREDIBLE! The love of our Country has never been stronger! ... Happy Independence Day. Our Country is Stronger than EVER!!!
moments.why: A high-profile ex-president’s patriotic post during Freedom 250 celebrations drew widespread attention and debate.
moments.url: postxpulse listing of Trump’s July 4 X activity

moments.author: National Rugby League (NRL)
moments.quote: BUT, we do have tickets to Rugby League Las Vegas in February if you're looking for honeymoon plans. @tkelce you'll love it. Trust us.
moments.why: The NRL playfully invited Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce to attend its Vegas games, blending pop culture and sports in a viral way.
moments.url: ABC News coverage of NRL social media post

moments.author: Joey Chestnut
moments.quote: Called competitive hot dog eating “the most patriotic sport we’ve got.”
moments.why: Chestnut’s pre‑competition comment ahead of his record Fourth of July Nathan’s win sparked fun patriotic buzz.
moments.url: NBC Los Angeles report on Nathan’s contest including his Instagram video
